releaseNotes:
New: Guide long-press now offers Notify me, Auto-tune, or Record for any upcoming program. Movies and TV Shows now remember where you left off and resume automatically, and you can mark anything watched or unwatched from a long-press. My List is now split into Live TV, Movies, TV Shows, and Recordings so favorites are easier to find.

Fixed: channels and program guides now refresh in the background on a schedule instead of making you wait when you open the app, the Guide loads noticeably faster, a bug where the Guide's long-press menu vanished the instant you released the OK button, search results not saving to favorites on long-press, and the app incorrectly shrinking into picture-in-picture mode when opening a stream in an external player.
